creator: dglo@hyde.ssec.wisc.edu
text:
Ernst de Haan wrote:
> Would it be possible to update mysql-jdbc-mm to upgrade to a newer version 
> while still building JDBC1 and JDBC2 classes?

I'm not sure what you mean.  The latest mm.mysql version is 2.0.11,
and I sent in a patch file to update the port to that version on
Mar 4 (ports/34150)

Is there something I'm missing?

> Perhaps you can use the new USE_JAVA infrastructure ?

I plan on doing that eventually.
